text:
Hello;

Some more feedback ...
I was indeed wondering about an OSMesa port since I need it for VTK5 as the=
 default instead of using Mangled Mesa.

It is useful for Paraview :
http://www.vtk.org/Wiki/Setting_up_a_ParaView_Server#OSMesa_support

Pedro.
